name: cli-consultants
description: Three-channel review flow: Codex (required CLI) + optional Gemini (CLI) + Plan-subagent (via Claude Code Agent tool). Operational policy and setup tooling. Codex-only-plus-Plan mode automatically fills the second-voice slot via Plan-subagent when Gemini is not installed. Final-pass prompts include a mandatory agent-execution question that catches execution-readiness bugs missed by architectural review.
